# Regression test for chain-mode 'f' (direction) and 'd' (delete) in a
# lot split by a partition drive line. Exercises the user-reported bug
# where:
#
#   * chain-mode 'd' silently collapsed to a single sub-edge delete
#     (chainToAbstractLatticeEdge rejected the chain because the
#     midpoint was near the partition boundary), and
#   * chain-mode 'f' stored a multi-cell direction annotation but the
#     engine couldn't apply it (apply_abstract_direction required a
#     direct graph edge between the endpoints, which only exists for
#     adjacent single-cell annotations).
#
# Both fixes let chain-mode annotations cover the whole row/column in
# a region and apply to every sub-edge along it.

polygon outer
0,0
400,0
400,300
0,300
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stalls_per_face=4
----
set stalls_per_face=4

# Vertical partition drive line — splits the lot into left + right
# regions with independent aisle frames.
drive-line partitions
200,0
200,300
----
drive-line: 200,0 -> 200,300 partitions

generate
----
total_stalls: 162

# Chain-mode delete inside the left region. The click at (100, 120)
# lands on a vertical column aisle; chain expansion walks the whole
# column (constant x, varying y over 6 cells).
edge-select near=100,120 mode=chain
----
edge-select seed=72 mode=chain chain_len=6

edge-delete
----
edge-delete

annotations
----
delete-edge on=grid region=0x00003c159bc36ac7 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:0,lattice:6

# The annotation must actually apply — stall count should change
# relative to baseline because a full column of aisle sub-edges is
# removed, which frees space the generator now fills with stalls.
generate
----
total_stalls: 180

# Chain-mode direction on a horizontal row in the right region.
edge-select near=300,120 mode=chain
----
edge-select seed=154 mode=chain chain_len=8

edge-cycle
----
edge-cycle

annotations
----
delete-edge on=grid region=0x00003c159bc36ac7 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:0,lattice:6
direction on=grid region=0x0000354ed55eccc5 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-8,lattice:1 traffic=two-way-oriented

# Annotation must resolve (non-dormant) — apply_abstract_direction
# should touch every sub-edge in the chain, not just the adjacent pair.
generate
----
total_stalls: 180

dormant
----
dormant_annotations: 0
